revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿六]][[zh:六月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿六]][[zh:六月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿六]][[zh:六月廿六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿六]][[zh:六月廿六]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 26|qq=June 26}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|qid=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|721|en|721|qid=Q23541|lt=721|1=721}} ) – {{ill|Suwa Province|en|Suwa Province|qid=Q1192248|lt=Suwa Province|1=Suwa Province}} was separated from {{ill|Shinano Province|en|Shinano Province|qid=Q289250|lt=Shinano Province|1=Shinano Province}} . * {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|721|en|721|qid=Q23541|lt=721|1=721}} ) – {{ill|Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident|ja|清涼殿落雷事件|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiryōden Lightning Strike Incident|1=Seiryōden lightning strike incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11561292}} : Lightning struck the Seiryōden palace, causing the immediate death of {{ill|Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623386}} . Rumors spread attributing the incident to the vengeful spirit of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q382005}} . * [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 26 (Julian calendar {{ill|July 18|en|July 18|qid=Q2730|lt=July 18|1=July 18}} , {{ill|1419|en|1419|qid=Q6205|lt=1419|1=1419}} ) – {{ill|Ōei Invasion|ja|Ōeiの外寇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei Invasion|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . Korean forces attacked {{ill|Tsushima Island|en|Tsushima Island|qid=Q52051|lt=Tsushima|1=Tsushima Island}} to suppress continued {{ill|Wokou|en|Wokou|qid=Q697605|lt=Wokou|1=Wokou}} pirate raids. * {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|qid=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} 5 (Julian calendar July 24, {{ill|721|en|721|qid=Q23541|lt=721|1=721}} ) – An international telegraph line opened between Nagasaki and Shanghai, marking the beginning of Japan's international telegraph service.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} 14 (Julian calendar {{ill|August 3|en|August 3|qid=Q2786|lt=August 3|1=August 3}} , {{ill|1545|en|1545|qid=Q6531|lt=1545|1=1545}} ) – {{ill|Kamada Masachika|ja|鎌田政近|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamada Masachika|1=Q11651064|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11651064}} , Sengoku-era military commander * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 7 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1795|en|1795|qid=Q7815|lt=1795|1=1795}} ) – {{ill|Kido Takayoshi|en|Kido Takayoshi|qid=Q696402|lt=Kido Takayoshi|1=Kido Takayoshi}} , one of the {{ill|Three Great Nobles of the Restoration|en|Three Great Nobles of the Restoration|qid=Q709678|lt=Three Great Nobles of the Meiji Restoration|1=Three Great Nobles of the Restoration}} (d. {{ill|1877|en|1877|qid=Q7773|lt=1877|1=1877}} ) * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 10|en|August 10|qid=Q2779|lt=August 10|1=August 10}} , {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} ) – {{ill|Kiyozawa Manshi|en|Kiyozawa Manshi|qid=Q6419167|lt=Kiyozawa Manshi|1=Kiyozawa Manshi}} , Buddhist monk of the {{ill|Ōtani-ha|en|Ōtani-ha|qid=Q7108435|lt=Shinshū Ōtani-ha|1=Ōtani-ha}}
== Deaths == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enchō|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97379316}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|721|en|721|qid=Q23541|lt=721|1=721}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|ja|藤原清貫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|1=Fujiwara no Kiyotsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623386}} , provisional major counselor (Gondainagon) and minister of civil affairs (Minbu-kyō), killed instantly during the lightning strike at Seiryoden (b. {{ill|867|en|867|qid=Q30347|lt=867|1=867}} ) * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 17 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} , {{ill|1732|en|1732|qid=Q6966|lt=1732|1=1732}} ) – {{ill|Hosokawa Nobunori|ja|細川宣紀|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Nobunori|1=Hosokawa Nobunori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11605877}} , 4th lord of {{ill|Kumamoto Domain|en|Kumamoto Domain|qid=Q1194248|lt=Kumamoto Domain|1=Kumamoto Domain}} (b. {{ill|1676|en|1676|qid=Q7628|lt=1676|1=1676}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|25|6|27|5|26|7|6|0626|qq=}}
